name: mmlispdrv
description: MMLispDRV — Z80 sound driver (Phase 3) with a first-party assemble/emulate/trace toolchain

scripts.verify:stress: node tools/verify.mjs tests/stress-m1.mmlisp --frames 1800 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/stress-m2skip.mmlisp --frames 1200
scripts.verify:m2: node tools/verify.mjs tests/m2-motion.mmlisp --frames 800 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m2b-pitch.mmlisp --frames 500 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m2-csm.mmlisp --frames 300 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m2-pcm.mmlisp --frames 200 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m2-pcmloop.mmlisp --frames 400 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m2-mailbox.mmlisp --frames 400
scripts.verify:m3: node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-fm3op.mmlisp --frames 300 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-macro.mmlisp --frames 300 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-macro-curve.mmlisp --frames 300 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-macro-semi.mmlisp --frames 300 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-dynval.mmlisp --frames 200 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-macro-pitch.mmlisp --frames 200 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-macro-multi.mmlisp --frames 300 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-pcm-softmix.mmlisp --frames 300 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-macro-keyon.mmlisp --frames 200 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-slur.mmlisp --frames 300 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-macro-vel.mmlisp --frames 200 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m3-opparam.mmlisp --frames 300
scripts.verify:all: npm run selftest && npm run verify && npm run verify:stress && npm run verify:m2 && npm run verify:m3
